1: Blessed are all who fear the LORD,who walk in His ways!
2: For when you eat the fruit of your labor,blessings and prosperity will be yours.
3: Your wife will be like a fruitful vineflourishing within your house,your sons like olive shootssitting around your table.
4: In this way indeed shall blessing cometo the man who fears the LORD.
5: May the LORD bless you from Zion,that you may see the prosperity of Jerusalemall the days of your life,
6: that you may seeyour children’s children.Peace be upon Israel!
